title: dryopteris jaculosa
intro: Dryopteris jaculosa, also known as the Australian golden-ribbon fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus, native to eastern Australia. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris jaculosa lie in its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are found in its leaves and stems. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Dryopteris jaculosa can be prepared as a herbal tea by steeping its leaves in hot water or as a tincture by infusing its leaves in a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
